channel.title: python on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in python on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: How I Setup My Local Python Environment
item.description: I’ve had a few people ask me lately how I setup my local python environment.

item.title: How To Use the Python Debugger aka pdb
item.description: I have been using the Python Debugger aka pdb docs for 2.

item.title: How to Run a Single Test With Tox
item.description: I have to run a single python test once in a while and keep forgetting how to do it with Tox.

item.title: xkcd - ubuntu, python comics
item.description: If you don’t currently read xkcd.com, you should be. It has some mushy lovey dovey junk in it sometimes, but the python references and open source references are hilarious.
